author: @toubipark
text:

「あなたは〜する。あるいは〜してもいい。」
獲得するアイテムにも効果以外に一文フレーバーテキストが付けてあって、それがゲームの世界観を補強しています。

author: @KayLovesSUGAR
text:
Ok tried this exact comp with my pontos in A5 and it was a lot of fun. I think they all fit together very well. 
I put Dream of the Sea WoD on Ryker. The additional crit chance helps with unexpected gains -2 arith effect for the tutored card. 
kinda tried to max out his crit chance with april tribute but honestly Dream of the Sea + Special Training Wheel might be way better because you're nearly at 100% crit after posse use and it frees up the cov slot.

great comp 👍
video_title: [Morimens] Pontos AKA Gaunt DPS Comp Commentary D-Tide 7-4-26 W2A5
